function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0011
alias: helios_followup_support_invoice
issued_on: 2026-03-29
total_eur: 550
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 160
    line_eur: 160
---
# Helios rollout support invoice

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                         |
| invoice_number | INV-0011                        |
| alias          | helios_followup_support_invoice |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-29                      |
| total_eur      | 550                             |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH  |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint          |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                  |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 2 | staff follow-up support            | 1   | 160      | 160      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 550      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A small late-stage invoice for rollout support after the usable version finally landed with staff.

next_step.current_state: Invoice frontmatter migration write succeeded. Inbox workflow requires deleting processed inbox item after successful completion; inbox file was already read, satisfying delete discipline.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Submit completion report with evidence refs
next_step.observation: The target invoice file was updated with YAML frontmatter and preserved body in a focused change.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task asked to review next inbound note and act on it. I processed the sole inbox file, followed OCR/frontmatter workflow + finance schema, migrated exactly the explicitly listed invoice file, preserved original body text under frontmatter, then deleted the inbox item. Completeness check: inbox listed exactly 1 file and I processed that one only. Arithmetic check used from invoice lines: 390 + 160 = 550, matching total_eur.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_next-task.md after completing the requested invoice OCR/frontmatter migration.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note successfully: added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_29__eur_000550__inv_0011__helios_followup_support_invoice.md using visible invoice data, preserved the existing note body verbatim below frontmatter, and removed the handled inbox item.

function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly instructed OCR/frontmatter extraction for one invoice file. The target invoice contained all required fields and line items per finance schema, enabling an exact migration without guessing. Completion cleanup was required by inbox workflow guidance and inbox lane rules.
completed_steps_laconic: write updated invoice with YAML frontmatter + preserved body
